title: Adventure Craft
description: Adventure Craft is RPG with many equipment,RPG class and mechanisms.
body:
![Name of modepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d417d821db339d6c7cc30f0d17f015b640f63045.png)

# **_About the Modpack_**

This modpack takes you into a world of medieval weapons with a unique twist. It features a variety of unusual and exciting weapons that will change the way you experience combat. The modpack also includes a wide range of different blocks and structures, providing endless possibilities for building and exploration. With several challenging bosses to defeat, it guarantees plenty of action and adventure. Additionally, it integrates the Create mod, allowing you to construct complex mechanisms and contraptions for even more creative gameplay. If you're looking for a fresh and thrilling experience, this modpack is a must-download. Dive into a medieval world filled with fun, creativity, and challenges!

# **_Where you can ask about modpack_**

This is a link to Discord [https://discord.gg/FkYjF3jz4X]
where you can ask the creators of the Blombix Team about their work. And if you have any ideas that could be included in modpacks, you can express your idea on this Discord.


![WHAT WE OFFER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97b9fdf49dda3384255b1405f9eed77139c4e894.png)
## ・ 🏢Some different Structures and many types of biomes
## ・ 🦖A lot of cretures and some bosses
## ・ ⚔️A lot of equipment
## ・🧙‍♂️Many types of different enchants
## ・ 🌐Better dimentions
## ・ 💻500+ mods
